text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after we win the Triple Crown, I arrive at
my office to find it's become a sea of cardboard
boxes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're all congratulatory presents from Seiun
Sky's grandfather. There's even a conspicuous box
with a fresh sea bream inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I leave the room for a moment, I overhear
Seiun Sky call her grandfather to say thanks. She
sounds happy and tries to get him to baby her a
bit.
